summary: Frontend testing for Seasons homepage redesign - All features verified working. Tested: Hero section with mountain background, horizontal search bar with Search button, 6 country cards in horizontal row (Your Choice + 5 Alternatives), 4-column visa info grid, different visa types (Japan=Visa Required, Thailand=Visa on Arrival, Maldives=Visa Free), close button, Explore Visa Details button, and wishlist buttons.

console_warnings.warning: Encountered two children with the same key
console_warnings.notes: React key collision warning - appears when modal opens. Does not break functionality but should be fixed for code quality.

passed_tests: Hero section displays with mountain background image and proper overlay
Search bar with destination input visible and functional
Month selector dropdown working correctly
Year selector dropdown working correctly
Search button visible and triggers search results
Clicking dropdown option triggers search results
Search results show 6 country cards in horizontal row (Your Choice + 5 Alternatives)
Your Choice card has orange border and 'Your Choice' label
Alternative cards show 'Alternative #1' through 'Alternative #5' labels
Each card shows flag, country name, season badge (Peak/Good)
Each alternate card shows visa type badge
Visa info section shows 'Confused About Visa? We Simplify It.' heading
4-column visa info grid displayed: Visa Type, Documents Needed, Processing Time, Cost Estimate
Explore Visa Details button visible and clickable
Close (X) button clears search results
Japan correctly shows 'Visa Required' with documents and $50-$200 cost
Thailand correctly shows 'Visa on Arrival' with 'At airport (15-30 mins)' processing
Maldives correctly shows 'Visa Free' with 'No processing required' and 'Free' cost
Wishlist buttons work on country cards - triggers auth modal for unauthenticated users
Explore Visa Details button opens CountryDetailModal with full visa info
Country card clicks open detail modal
Alternate destination card clicks open detail modal
All search results visible on homepage without scrolling (verified at 1920x1080)
action_items: LOW PRIORITY: Fix React key collision warning in CountryDetailModal component - 'Encountered two children with the same key'
critical_code_review_comments: Seasons.js redesign correctly implements all required features
6-column grid layout for country cards properly responsive
Visa info defaults correctly implemented based on visa_type
Search functionality works with both dropdown selection and Search button click
CountryDetailModal has React key collision warning that should be addressed
context_for_next_testing_agent: Seasons homepage redesign fully tested and working. All features verified: Hero section with background, horizontal search bar with Search button, 6-column country cards grid (Your Choice + 5 Alternatives), 4-column visa info section, different visa types working correctly. Minor React key warning in CountryDetailModal component remains from previous iterations.

hero_section.title: Plan Your Trip + Visa in One Place

visa_info_section.heading: Confused About Visa? We Simplify It.
